Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Special And Supplemental Interrogatories And Supplemental Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-12-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Anthony Deichler, Esq., appeared for Defendant & moving party: Geroge Kolombatovich
No other appearance

Ruling:
Tentative Ruling adopted: Defendant George Kolombatovich's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Responses To Special And Supplemental Interrogatories And Supplemental Request For Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to personally serve his responses on or before March 14, 2008. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $320, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
